description.value:
Frequency once per 10 minutes

Requirements A creature within your reach is taking persistent bleed damage, or is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Grabbed], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Paralyzed], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Restrained], @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Unconscious], or willing.

You jab your proboscis into the required creature to consume their blood. Attempt an @Check[athletics|against:fortitude] check against the target's Fortitude DC. You automatically succeed on this check if the target is paralyzed, unconscious, or willing (but you still roll to see if you get a critical success). On a success, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Drained]{Drained 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Drained]{Drained 2} on a critical success), and you gain temporary Hit Points equal to the target's level that last for 10 minutes.
